repos.name: pages
repos.description: A blog and portfolio site featuring a terminal-inspired design, auto-fetched GitHub projects, and build-time markdown processing.

repos.name: pages
repos.description: A blog and portfolio site featuring a terminal-inspired design, auto-fetched GitHub projects, and build-time markdown processing.

repos.name: clone-sweeper
repos.description: Clone Sweeper is an automated GitHub repository analytics tool that collects clone traffic data.

repos.name: machine-learning
repos.description: A curated collection of machine learning projects covering various domains including computer vision, predictive modeling, and data analysis.

repos.name: fine-tuning-an-local-llm-for-web-scraping
repos.description: A guide to building a custom web scraping AI assistant by fine-tuning Qwen2.5-3B to extract structured JSON data from job postings.

repos.name: todays-command
repos.description: Today's Command is a modern Linux desktop widget that delivers a curated daily command directly to your screen, complete with explanations, interactive quizzes, streak tracking, and customizable reminders.

repos.name: myjam
repos.description: Versatile audio converter built on ffmpeg with both CLI and web GUI interfaces

repos.name: ai-job-finder
repos.description: A multi-agent system that automates job searching and career guidance using state-of-the-art language models and web scraping. The system leverages the CrewAI framework to coordinate multiple specialized agents, including a job searcher, skills developer, interview coach, and career advisor.

repos.name: E-commerce-Conversion-Prediction
repos.description: Aims to develop an AI model that predicts whether a visitor session on an e-commerce website will result in a purchase. By analyzing historical session data, the goal is to enhance the user experience and increase conversion rates.

repos.name: Convolutional-Neural-Networks-CNNs-from-scratch
repos.description: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) from scratch, inspired by models like EfficientNet and Inception, trained on the CIFAR-10 dataset.

repos.name: data-processing
repos.description: Analyzes crime data in Chicago from 2008-2012, along with selected census data. The goal is to explore correlations between crime rates and socioeconomic factors.

repos.name: CAN-T-SEE-THE-FOREST-FOR-ALL-THE-TREES
repos.description: Univariate analysis of various variables from a dataset, followed by predictive modeling using decision trees and random forests. The aim is to explore and understand different factors affecting student performance.

repos.name: podcast-retriever
repos.description: Podcast Retriever is a Python-based tool designed to aggregate and consolidate podcast data from multiple sources, including the iTunes Search API, RSS feeds and Podchaser. The tool builds a comprehensive podcast database by fetching data, processing raw JSON responses, and outputting the final dataset as an Excel file.

repos.name: dynamic-webscraper
repos.description: Versatile web scraping tool designed to extract and structure data from any website, dynamically adjusting to the data structure without hardcoded parameters. The scraper uses Selenium and BeautifulSoup for web interaction and HTML parsing, while the Groq LLM models handle data alignment and unification. The data is output in JSON

repos.name: ai-agent
repos.description: A flexible and extensible AI agent system that combines LLM capabilities with custom tools for interactive task execution. The system supports multi-tool operations, memory retention, and natural language interactions.

repos.name: digit-classifier-api
repos.description: An educational project that teaches how to build a machine learning web application using Python, FastAPI, and scikit-learn. Learn to train a model on the MNIST dataset, create a REST API, and deploy to the cloud.

repos.name: media-compressor
repos.description: A web application that allows users to compress images and videos to target file sizes while maintaining maximum quality. Built with Flask backend and Tailwind CSS frontend, containerized with Docker.

repos.name: digiti-signum
repos.description: An scientific research project that explores classical and forensic fingerprint matching techniques using the SOCOFing dataset.

repos.name: gif-maker
repos.description: A web-based tool to generate GIFs from images, multiple images, or videos. Built with React + Vite for the frontend and Flask for the backend.

repos.name: digit-recognition
repos.description: A Streamlit web application for recognizing handwritten digits (0-9) using a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) trained on the MNIST dataset.

repos.name: Understanding-Data-Augmentation
repos.description: A Jupyter notebook demonstrating the impact of data augmentation on neural network training using ResNet18 on the CIFAR-10 dataset.

repos.name: project-horseshoe
repos.description: Fast, concurrent subnet scanner designed for local network discovery and TCP port enumeration.

repos.name: Atlas
repos.description: Atlas — Web-scraping toolkit for Swedish authorities. Automates data collection with pagination, PDF crawling, metadata extraction, and multi-format export.

repos.name: project-jackheart
repos.description: Project Jackheart is an educational project demonstrating byte-level file techniques: hiding data in JPEGs, embedding images inside images, building polyglot files, and header-level codec-aware MP3 steganography (private-bit embedding + AES-GCM). The notebooks emphasize secure, local experimentation, reproducibility, and OPSEC.

repos.name: Amnesiac-Shell
repos.description: Lightweight Bash tool for Linux that provides on-demand private shells and automatic session history erasure, designed for OpSec, security research, and anyone who wants to avoid leaving persistent command traces.

repos.name: Changeling
repos.description: A lightweight Linux utility to enable MAC address randomization via NetworkManager, reducing the risk of device tracking on WiFi and Ethernet networks.

repos.name: Ikigai
repos.description: Ikigai (生き甲斐) - Cross-distro Linux Hardening

repos.name: api-forge
repos.description: A POC project where we have an AI-powered OpenAPI specification generator with multi-agent architecture, MCP context sharing, and automatic validation with auto-fix.

repos.name: one-persons-feature-is-another-persons-exploit
repos.description: A short educational guide and hands-on workbook demonstrating how image metadata can leak sensitive information, why that matters for OPSEC, and practical steps to inspect and remove metadata safely.

repos.name: playwright-pixelscan
repos.description: playwright-pixelscan is a Python-based project that demonstrates how to use Playwright to simulate mobile browsing and inspect what information websites can collect from your browser.
